src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/EventC.general_idea: Add io.prometheus.client dependency for Prometheus metrics export.
Add io.prometheus.client.dropwizard dependency for bridging Dropwizard metrics to Prometheus.
Add io.prometheus.client.exporter dependency for the Prometheus HTTP servlet.
Add org.eclipse.jetty.server dependency for hosting the metrics endpoint.
Add org.eclipse.jetty.servlet dependency for configuring the metrics servlet context.
Add com.codahale.metrics.jmx dependency for JMX reporting.
Add com.codahale.metrics.slf4j dependency for logging metrics.
Refactor constructor to accept Sourceable config source instead of instantiating configs directly.
Implement Prometheus metrics endpoint using Jetty and Dropwizard exports.
Implement JMX and SLF4J reporters for metrics.
Add atomic counters for records and total size to calculate estimated data depth.
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/EventC.human_impl: private final AtomicLong records = new AtomicLong(); private final AtomicLong allSize = new AtomicLong();

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/EventC.general_idea: Register gauges for latency and partition depth metrics.
Handle null message IDs by generating a UUID fallback.
Add Azure-specific structured data elements for partition and event details.
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/EventC.human_impl: SDElement sdPartition = new SDElement("aer_01_partition@48577") ... SDElement sdEvent = new SDElement("aer_01_event@48577")

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/EventC.general_idea: Set syslog severity and facility fields.
Update close method to shut down metrics reporters and Jetty server.
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/EventC.human_impl: public void close() throws Exception { ... slf4jReporter.close(); jmxReporter.close(); jettyServer.stop(); }

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Main.j.general_idea: Introduce a pluggable configuration source mechanism to support both property files and environment variables.
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Main.j.human_impl: Added imports for MetricsConfig, EnvironmentSource, PropertySource, Sourceable and implemented getConfigSource() method.

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Main.j.general_idea: Simplify main method signature by catching generic Exception instead of specific IOException and InterruptedException.
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Main.j.human_impl: Changed throws clause from 'throws IOException, InterruptedException' to 'throws Exception'.

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Main.j.general_idea: Update AzureConfig instantiation to accept the new configuration source dependency.
Update EventContextConsumer instantiation to accept configuration source and Prometheus port.
Correct the EventProcessorClient configuration to use the specific event hub name instead of the namespace name.

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Output.general_idea: The Output class was refactored into an interface, removing all implementation details, fields, and methods.
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Output.human_impl: Changed 'final class Output implements Consumer<byte[]>, AutoCloseable' to 'public interface Output extends Consumer<byte[]>, AutoCloseable' and removed all body content.

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Output.general_idea: Imports related to the removed implementation logic (metrics, Relp, logging, IO) were removed.
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Output.human_impl: Removed imports for com.codahale.metrics.*, com.teragrep.rlp_01.*, org.slf4j.*, java.io.*, java.nio.channels.*, java.util.concurrent.*.

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/config.general_idea: Replace direct System.getProperty calls with a configurable Sourceable interface to decouple configuration retrieval from the JVM environment.
Replace direct System.getProperty calls with a custom Sourceable interface to decouple configuration retrieval from the JVM environment.
Add import for the new configuration source interface.
Add a field to hold the configuration source instance.
Update constructor to accept and initialize the configuration source.
Replace system property access with the new configuration source method for app name.
Replace system property access with the new configuration source method for hostname.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 8 to Java 11 to align with the migration.
Simplify resource exclusion patterns by using a wildcard for the .github directory instead of listing specific workflow files.
Replace the exclusion of Jenkinsfile with Dockerfile to reflect the shift from Jenkins to Docker-based builds.
Configure the Surefire plugin to pass an Azure namespace environment variable during test execution.

.github/workflows/ci.yaml.general_idea: Update the CI workflow to use Java 11 instead of Java 8 to align with the project's migration target.

.github/workflows/upload_release.yaml.general_idea: Configure Maven Central deployment to use GPG signing by injecting private key and passphrase secrets.
Add a build step to package the application into an RPM file using a dedicated pom.xml.
.github/workflows/upload_release.yaml.human_impl: run: cd rpm/ && mvn --batch-mode ... -f rpm.pom.xml package

.github/workflows/upload_release.yaml.general_idea: Update the release attachment path to match the new RPM build output directory structure.
Authenticate with GitHub Container Registry to allow pushing Docker images.
Build and push a Docker image to GitHub Container Registry as part of the release workflow.
.github/workflows/upload_release.yaml.human_impl: docker buildx build --output type=docker --tag ghcr.io/${{ env.REPO_LC }}:${{ github.event.release.tag_name }} ...

.gitignore.general_idea: Add the flattened POM file generated by the maven-shade-plugin or similar to .gitignore.
Add the IntelliJ IDEA project directory to .gitignore.
Add the IntelliJ IDEA module file to .gitignore.
